title: Resolution requesting Congressman Jericho B. Nograles, PBA Partylist the amount of Three Hundred Fifty Million Pesos (P350,000,000.00) for various farm-to-market roads in the Municipality of Los Baños, Province of Laguna. (Author (s): Councilor(s) Janos S. Lapiz, Miko C. Peligrina, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo PJ A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester b. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Arlene P. Delos Santos and Jozylyn N. Manansala, 7/16/19)
